bootloader_rule: Read shared_frontier.json before starting new Nerdkle work.

next_bootloader.warning: Daily state snapshot exists, but live ledger readback is blocked.

blockers.next_action: Create or point SLEEP_CYCLE_DB/CIRCULATION_DB at the real production circulation.db before claiming daily action readback.

next_actions.action: Create or point SLEEP_CYCLE_DB/CIRCULATION_DB at the real production circulation.db before claiming daily action readback.

false_start_guard: Do not start tomorrow from chat memory.
Do not call daily memory complete while frontier_status is BLOCKER.
Do not invent completed packets when completed_packet_count is 0.
